title: amaryllis × pallida
intro: Amaryllis × pallida, also known as the Palid Amaryllis or Palid Belladonna, is a hybrid of the Amaryllis belladonna, a flowering plant known for its striking beauty and potential medicinal properties. Traditionally, Amaryllis × pallida has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing anxiety and stress, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Amaryllis × pallida can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
